summary: Complete testing of all 10 features requested: Login flow, Dashboard KPIs, Proactive Alerts, Agent Memory, Inventario Auteco, Settings (2FA/AuditLog/Webhooks), AI Chat Widget, and basic modules. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: all pages load correctly. Corrected endpoint names (agent/suggestions → agent/memory/suggestions, audit-log → audit-logs, inventario-auteco → inventario/motos, alegra/expenses → alegra/bills).

minor.issue: Endpoint does NOT exist at this path. Actual webhook endpoints are at /api/settings/webhooks/register (POST) and /api/settings/webhooks/status (GET). The review_request listed a wrong endpoint.

ui_bugs.issue: The 2FA configuration section in Settings > Seguridad tab is visible to 'compras@roddos.com' (non-admin user). Requirements say it should only be visible for admin (contabilidad@roddos.com). The backend /api/auth/2fa/setup uses require_admin which is correctly protected, but the UI doesn't hide the tab/section for non-admin users.

issues: Labels use uppercase: 'VENTAS DEL MES', 'FLUJO DE CAJA', 'POR COBRAR' - text search for 'Ventas', 'Flujo', 'Cobrar' in inner text (non-capitalized) didn't match but the KPIs are visually correct.

action_items: Hide Seguridad tab (or 2FA section inside it) for non-admin users in Settings.js. Only contabilidad@roddos.com (role=admin) should see 2FA setup.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.js: Seguridad tab with 2FA is visible to all users. Should check user.role === 'admin' before rendering the tab or the 2FA section.
Note: duplicate @api_router.get('/auth/me') definition found in server.py at lines 126 and 187 - minor redundancy but non-breaking since FastAPI uses last definition.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, 1 UI access-control issue in Settings 2FA visibility)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows work: login (both users), dashboard KPIs, IA alerts, chart, inventario auteco stats, settings tabs (Seguridad/Auditoría/Webhooks), AI chat widget, all 4 basic modules. MOCKED: Alegra data is demo mode. One bug: Seguridad/2FA tab visible to non-admin user (compras@roddos.com). Correct API endpoints: /api/agent/memory/suggestions, /api/audit-logs, /api/inventario/motos, /api/inventario/stats, /api/settings/webhooks/register, /api/settings/webhooks/status.
mocked_apis: Alegra ERP (/api/alegra/*) is MOCKED via mock_data.py in demo mode. AI Chat uses Claude Sonnet (real).
